description: Round 1: Added tests for PiSpawner appendFileSync catch, Engine pickByNumber missing shard, TaskState failureCount NaN branch, Worktree remove/gitConfig catch. total_pct improved from 21.64 to 18.80.

asi.hypothesis: Adding edge-case tests for uncovered branches (catch blocks, NaN parseInt fallback, missing directories) will increase coverage across all metrics.
asi.remaining_uncovered: Engine.ts:124-126 (heartbeat interval), PiSpawner.ts:44,52 (signal.abort), 98 (appendFileSync catch), Prerequisites.ts:14-22 (v8 closure), TaskState.ts:109 (convergenceCount ||0), 212 (scope ??), 275-279 (pick branches), Worktree.ts:57-59 (merge inner catch), 74 (autoResolve theirs)
